stat_block.text:
Elven chain is a chain shirt made of dawnsilver that glitters in even the faintest light. Because it’s constructed with small, supple rings, it has no check penalty.  
  
 Created by elven artisans employing ancient crafting techniques, elven chain is exceptionally quiet. Unlike other chain shirts—even other dawnsilver chain shirts—elven chain doesn’t have the noisy trait. This suit of armor can be etched with runes like any other dawnsilver chain shirt.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

variants.name: Elven Chain (Standard-Grade)
variants.text: The initial raw materials must include dawnsilver worth at least 3,125 sp.

variants.name: Elven Chain (High-Grade)
variants.text: The initial raw materials must include dawnsilver worth at least 26,000 gp.
